inspiration: Linear Learn intro chapter structure — product-is-the-lesson

chapters.title: Introduction
chapters.subtitle: Why policy must run before the agent acts
chapters.summary: Agents can send email, call tools, and publish content without a session prompt stopping them. Witness AI governs at dispatch — every irreversible step gets a verdict before execution.

chapters.title: Key features
chapters.subtitle: ALLOW · BLOCK · ESCALATE on the control plane
chapters.summary: The control plane shows live agent roster, policy scores, and verdict chips. BLOCK stops irreversible harm. ESCALATE routes to human gates. ALLOW proceeds with signed receipt.

chapters.title: Set-up
chapters.subtitle: Open Proof Lab · pick a scenario
chapters.summary: Proof Lab loads six JSON scenarios from disk SSOT. Pick outbound, tool, publish, PII leak, MCP, or tamper — each maps to real policy packs and receipt hashes.

chapters.title: Issues
chapters.subtitle: One outbound action · receipt terminal
chapters.summary: Watch an outbound email escalate to a human gate, approve, execute, and sign. The terminal shows every step — policy eval, human gate, execute, receipt hash.

chapters.title: Projects
chapters.subtitle: Governance loop · six gates
chapters.summary: From intake through prove — six gates each emit machine receipt codes. Replay the chain, then run tamper-FAIL to prove signatures detect edits.

chapters.title: Initiatives
chapters.subtitle: Pricing · book live proof
chapters.summary: Start with free AI policy packs. Scale to Witness AI Flow for first agentic install. Book a 15-min live proof session — we run tamper-FAIL on your call.

workflows.label: Scope
workflows.description: Agent proposes action → gate evaluates intent → ESCALATE or ALLOW

workflows.label: Execute
workflows.description: Approved action runs → receipt written to chain

workflows.label: Audit
workflows.description: Tamper attempt → FAIL on screen → hash mismatch visible

resources.label: Live onboarding
resources.description: Book 15-min proof — essentials + tamper-FAIL on your screen

resources.description: ~51s film · real UI capture · Linear-style chapters
